items.title_en: Judge Orders Government to Begin Refunding More Than $130B in Tariffs
items.title_zh: 法官命令政府开始退还超过1300亿美元关税
items.summary_en: A judge has ordered the government to start refunding more than $130 billion collected as tariffs. The ruling could unwind years of tariff policy and ease costs for importers, potentially affecting downstream prices and Treasury receipts. The refunds will roll out over time as the government processes claims.
items.summary_zh: 法院命令政府开始退还超过1300亿美元关税。此项裁决可能推翻多年的关税政策并减轻进口商负担，进而影响下游价格和财政收入。退税将随着政府分批处理申请而逐步兑现。

items.title_en: No right to relicense this project
items.title_zh: 无权重新授权此项目
items.summary_en: Discusses licensing rights around relicensing a project, arguing that the author cannot unilaterally relicense without consent or that relicensing rights are contested. The post underscores how licensing choices affect community adoption and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 探讨关于对一个项目进行再授权的许可权问题，认为作者在未获得同意的情况下不能单方面改变授权，或指出再授权权利存在争议。文章强调许可选择会影响社区采纳与协作。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo
items.title_zh: 苹果推出 MacBook Neo
items.summary_en: Apple officially launches MacBook Neo, a budget-friendly model powered by A18 Pro, targeting students and light workloads. The device promises improved energy efficiency and a more accessible gateway into Apple's ecosystem, potentially expanding its mass-market share.
items.summary_zh: 苹果正式推出 MacBook Neo，搭载 A18 Pro 芯片，定位入门级，面向学生与轻量级工作。新机承诺提升能效并降低入门门槛，或对苹果在大众市场的份额产生积极影响。

items.title_en: Google Workspace CLI
items.title_zh: Google Workspace CLI（命令行工具）
items.summary_en: Google Workspace CLI is an official command-line tool for managing Google Workspace. It enables administrators to automate tasks like user provisioning, group management, and policy configuration. This complements the web console and makes routine admin work more scriptable.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌官方发布 Google Workspace 的命令行工具，方便管理员通过脚本执行用户创建、组管理与策略配置等任务。该工具补充了网页控制台，帮助自动化日常运维工作并提升效率。

items.title_en: The L in "LLM" Stands for Lying
items.title_zh: LLM 中的 L 代表撒谎
items.summary_en: Argues that large language models frequently produce incorrect or deceptive outputs, challenging developers to evaluate reliability and trust.
items.summary_zh: 认为大型语言模型经常产生不正确或误导性的输出，敦促开发者评估可靠性与信任度。文章探讨模型能力与真实度之间的权衡，以及从业者应当衡量的指标。

items.title_en: Dario Amodei calls OpenAI’s messaging around military deal ‘straight up lies’
items.title_zh: 达里奥·阿莫迪称 OpenAI 关于军用交易的表述是赤裸裸的谎言
items.summary_en: Dario Amodei publicly calls OpenAI's messaging around a military deal 'straight-up lies'. The dispute underscores tensions around defense partnerships in the AI industry and how firms communicate sensitive collaborations. The episode matters for policy, ethics, and the geopolitics of AI development.
items.summary_zh: 达里奥·阿莫迪公开指控 OpenAI 就军事交易的表述为“赤裸裸的谎言”，暴露了 AI 行业在军事合作中的分歧与信任危机。此事凸显政府与企业在军事应用中的沟通难题及相关伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Nvidia PersonaPlex 7B on Apple Silicon: Full-Duplex Speech-to-Speech in Swift
items.title_zh: NVIDIA PersonaPlex 7B 在 Apple Silicon 上：Swift 原生实现的全双工语音对话
items.summary_en: A developer demonstrates running Nvidia PersonaPlex 7B on Apple Silicon with a native Swift implementation, enabling full-duplex speech-to-speech processing on-device. This on-device pipeline reduces latency and preserves privacy by avoiding cloud audio processing, though the 7B model footprint still limits practical use cases.
items.summary_zh: 开发者展示在 Apple Silicon 上使用原生 Swift 实现 Nvidia PersonaPlex 7B，支持本地的全双工语音对语音处理。该方案实现边缘推理，降低延迟并提升隐私，但规模为 7B 的模型在实际应用中仍受硬件制约。

items.title_en: Relicensing with AI-Assisted Rewrite
items.title_zh: Relicensing with AI-Assisted Rewrite
items.summary_en: Relicensing with AI-assisted rewrite discusses using AI to rewrite licenses to ease relicensing workflows, raising considerations about legal accuracy and consistency. It highlights potential time savings but cautions about compliance risks.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论在重新许可时使用 AI 辅助改写许可文本，以简化 relicensing 的流程，同时引发对法律准确性与一致性的关注。指出这类工具可能带来时间上的节省，但也需警惕合规风险。

items.title_en: Building a new Flash
items.title_zh: 打造一个新的 Flash
items.summary_en: A concise look at what it would take to build a new Flash-era platform for multimedia content in today’s web, considering security, performance, and cross-device support.
items.summary_zh: 简要探讨在当今网络环境下构建一个新的 Flash 时代平台以承载多媒体内容所需的安全性、性能与跨设备支持等要点。

items.title_en: An interactive map of Flock Cams
items.title_zh: Flock Cams 的互动地图
items.summary_en: An interactive map visualizes the locations of Flock Cams, revealing how a distributed surveillance network covers public spaces. The dynamic visualization prompts reflection on privacy, governance, and how open data about cameras could be used by researchers, journalists, or curious citizens.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动地图展示了 Flock Cams 的所在位置，揭示了分布式监控网络覆盖公共空间的规模。该可视化凸显了相机数据的隐私和治理问题，以及开放数据在问责与新闻报道中的潜在作用。

items.title_en: You Just Reveived
items.title_zh: 你刚刚收到了
items.summary_en: Something has just been received, signaling a new event.
items.summary_zh: 刚刚收到了一样东西，标志着一个新事件的到来。

items.title_en: Something is afoot in the land of Qwen
items.title_zh: Qwen 领域出现新动向
items.summary_en: Qwen domain shows signs of acceleration with model updates and ecosystem progress, signaling stronger competition to established LLMs. The discussion aggregates signals that developers and researchers are watching for open models, tooling, and licensing shifts.
items.summary_zh: Qwen 领域正在加速，出现模型更新和生态系统进展，显示出对现有大模型的更强竞争。讨论聚焦开发者和研究者关注的开源模型、工具链与许可变化等信号。

items.title_en: Poor Man's Polaroid
items.title_zh: 穷人的宝丽来：用低成本方案实现宝丽来风格照片
items.summary_en: A budget-friendly project demonstrates how to reproduce Polaroid-style photos with inexpensive gear. By pairing a cheap camera or smartphone with a DIY frame and instant-print workflow, it achieves retro aesthetics without the cost of a real Polaroid setup.
items.summary_zh: 一个低成本项目演示如何用廉价设备复刻宝丽来风格的照片。通过将便宜的相机或手机与自制相框和即时打印流程结合，实现在不花大钱的情况下获得复古效果。

items.title_en: Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable
items.title_zh: 摩托罗拉的 GrapheneOS 设备将支持解锁与重新锁定引导加载程序
items.summary_en: Motorola's GrapheneOS devices will support bootloader unlock and relock, restoring user control over the device's software stack while keeping the security workflow intact. This enables custom ROM flashing and safer recovery paths, aligned with GrapheneOS's privacy and hardening goals. It also tests how manufacturers balance openness with enterprise security expectations.
items.summary_zh: 摩托罗拉的 GrapheneOS 设备将支持解锁并重新锁定引导加载程序，重新赋予用户对软件栈的控制，同时保持安全更新流程完备。此举让刷入自定义 ROM 和更安全的设备恢复成为可能，与 GrapheneOS 的隐私与强化安全目标相契合。也反映出厂商在开放性与企业安全之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 黄仁勋称 Nvidia 正在从 OpenAI 与 Anthropic 收缩
items.summary_en: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic, but his rationale raises more questions than it answers. The remark hints at shifting strategic alignments for Nvidia as a compute provider in AI, with potential implications for partnerships and access to hardware.
items.summary_zh: 黄仁勋表示英伟达正在从 OpenAI 与 Anthropic 的合作中撤出，但其解释引发更多疑问。此举折射出算力提供商在 AI 生态中的角色变化，以及对伙伴关系与硬件获取的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Smalltalk's Browser: Unbeatable, yet Not Enough
items.title_zh: Smalltalk 浏览器：无可匹敌，却仍有不足
items.summary_en: Smalltalk's browser remains legendary for its live, integrated code exploration, but lacks modern IDE features and a vibrant ecosystem. The discussion uses this to illustrate how deeply entrenched tools can both empower and constrain developer productivity over time.
items.summary_zh: Smalltalk 的浏览器以其即时、集成的代码浏览能力而著称，但现代 IDE 功能与生态系统支持仍然不足。此话题借此说明，长期依赖的工具既能提升生产力，也可能限制创新和迁移。

items.title_en: Show HN: Poppy – A simple app to stay intentional with relationships
items.title_zh: Show HN: Poppy——一款帮助在关系中保持有意识的简单应用
items.summary_en: Poppy is a minimal app designed to help people nurture relationships by keeping goals and meaningful interactions in view. It demonstrates how a focused, single-purpose tool can outperform bloated social apps for personal care. The project also reminds us that thoughtful UX can outperform feature-heavy options in the relationship space.
items.summary_zh: Poppy 是一个极简应用，帮助用户通过记录重要互动和设定关系目标来经营人际关系。它展示了一个小而聚焦的工具如何在拥挤的应用生态中帮助人们更有意识地行动。该项目也提醒人们，深思熟虑的用户体验往往胜过功能繁多的社交应用。

items.title_en: The Self-Help Trap: What 20 Years of "Optimizing" Has Taught Me
items.title_zh: 自我提升的陷阱：二十年追求“优化”教会我的事
items.summary_en: Twenty years of chasing optimization in self-help circles reveals a trap: relentless tweaking can undermine meaning and autonomy. The author argues for sustainable balance, focusing on worth and well-being rather than constant efficiency gains.
items.summary_zh: 对二十年来自助领域的“优化”热潮进行反思，指出无休止的追求效率可能侵蚀人生意义与自主性。作者主张在效率与幸福之间寻求可持续的平衡，而非不断的优化。

items.title_en: US tech firms pledge at White House to bear costs of energy for datacenters
items.title_zh: 美国科技公司承诺在白宫承担数据中心能源成本
items.summary_en: Tech companies pledge at the White House to bear energy costs for data centers, signaling policy-driven pressure to manage rising energy bills. The move could influence datacenter location decisions and spur investments in energy efficiency and grid resilience.
items.summary_zh: 科技公司在白宫承诺承担数据中心能源成本，显示出为应对日益上升的能源账单与电网压力而推动的政策导向。此举可能影响数据中心选址与能效投资，并体现政企在能源议题上的协同。

items.title_en: Jails for NetBSD – Kernel Enforced Isolation and Native Resource Control
items.title_zh: NetBSD 的 Jail：内核强制隔离与本地资源控制
items.summary_en: NetBSD is advancing jail-like isolation with kernel-enforced boundaries and native resource controls, enabling more secure multi-tenant deployments on the OS.
items.summary_zh: NetBSD 正在推进内核级的 Jail 隔离与本地资源控制，使操作系统在多租户部署中更安全。

items.title_en: Qwen3.5 Fine-Tuning Guide
items.title_zh: Qwen3.5 微调指南 - Unsloth 文档
items.summary_en: Unsloth's guide walks through practical fine-tuning of Qwen 3.5, including data selection, training steps, and safety considerations. The document helps practitioners push model behavior in controlled directions while managing budget and risk.
items.summary_zh: Unsloth 的指南讲解如何对 Qwen 3.5 进行实际微调，包括数据选择、训练步骤与安全性考量，帮助从业者在受控条件下引导模型行为，同时兼顾预算与风险管理。

items.title_en: “It turns out” (2010)
items.title_zh: 原来如此（2010）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at a notable moment from 2010 and its lessons for today’s software and data practices.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2010 年的一个知名时刻及其对当今软件与数据实践的启示。

items.title_en: Chaos and Dystopian news for the dead internet survivors
items.title_zh: 死网生还者的混乱与反乌托邦新闻
items.summary_en: A dark, tongue-in-cheek look at the 'dead internet' and the dystopian news that might haunt its survivors. It uses the premise to examine the fragility of online ecosystems, information integrity, and how communities cling to fragments of the old web.
items.summary_zh: 本文用黑色幽默笔触描绘所谓“死网”生还者所面临的混乱与反乌托邦新闻。通过这个设想，探讨在线生态的脆弱性、信息的完整性，以及社区如何在旧网络碎片中寻找坚持。

items.title_en: BMW Group to deploy humanoid robots in production in Germany for the first time
items.title_zh: 宝马集团将首次在德国生产线上部署 humanoid 机器人
items.summary_en: BMW Group plans to deploy humanoid robots in German production for the first time, signaling deeper automation in manufacturing. The move could boost efficiency but raises questions about worker transition, safety, and maintenance.
items.summary_zh: 宝马集团宣布首次在德国生产线上部署 humanoid 机器人，标志着制造业自动化的进一步推进。该举措可能提升效率，同时也引发对工人转岗、安全与维护的讨论。

items.title_en: Dulce et Decorum Est (1921)
items.title_zh: 《甜蜜与荣光的陨落》（1921）
items.summary_en: Dulce et Decorum Est exposes the horrors of war and mocks patriotic rhetoric that praises dying for one’s country. Owen uses vivid, grim imagery to shock readers into questioning the cost of conflict.
items.summary_zh: 这首诗揭示战争的惨烈以及对为国捐躯的爱国言辞的讽刺。欧文通过生动而冷峻的意象震撼读者，促使人们质疑冲突的代价。

items.title_en: OpenBSD on SGI: A Rollercoaster Story
items.title_zh: 在 SGI 上运行 OpenBSD：一段跌宕起伏的经历
items.summary_en: Running OpenBSD on SGI hardware has proven challenging but rewarding, highlighting the fragility of porting modern OSes to aging platforms and the tenacity of the open-source community.
items.summary_zh: 在 SGI 硬件上运行 OpenBSD 的经历起伏明显，暴露出将现代操作系统移植到老旧平台的挑战，也体现了开源社区的韧性。

items.title_en: NRC issues first commercial reactor construction approval in 10 years [pdf]
items.title_zh: NRC 十年来首次批准商业核反应堆建设
items.summary_en: The NRC grants the first commercial reactor construction approval in ten years, marking a milestone for US nuclear energy. The decision underscores renewed interest in nuclear power amid energy security concerns, with safety and regulation at the forefront.
items.summary_zh: 美国核能监管机构十年来首次批准商业核反应堆建设，标志着美国核能领域的重要里程碑。该决定反映在能源安全背景下对核能的重新关注，同时需要严格的安全与监管。

items.title_en: Moss is a pixel canvas where every brush is a tiny program
items.title_zh: Moss：每一笔刷都是小程序的像素画布
items.summary_en: Moss turns brush strokes into small programs, forming a pixel canvas. The design lets artists craft complex visuals by composing tiny algorithms, blurring the line between art and software. It showcases computation embedded directly in visual creation.
items.summary_zh: Moss 将笔触变为小程序，形成像素画布。通过把微型算法拼接来创作复杂视觉效果，模糊了艺术与软件的边界。展示了将计算直接嵌入视觉创作中的创新做法。

items.title_en: NanoGPT Slowrun: Language Modeling with Limited Data, Infinite Compute
items.title_zh: NanoGPT Slowrun：在有限数据、无限计算的语言建模
items.summary_en: Slowrun explores language modeling with limited data but abundant compute, using strategies that maximize training efficiency and data augmentation. It demonstrates that clever data regimes and scaling can yield competitive models without huge datasets.
items.summary_zh: Slowrun 探索在数据有限、计算资源充足的条件下进行语言建模，利用高效训练与数据增广等策略。显示出通过巧妙的数据方案与扩展规模，即使数据量不大也能训练出具有竞争力的模型。

items.title_en: Claude's Cycles [pdf]
items.title_zh: Claude 的循环（PDF）
items.summary_en: Stanford/Knuth-hosted paper examines cycles in Claude, offering formal analysis and possibly algorithmic insights. It presents a theoretical exploration of repetitive structures in Claude’s context, with formal proofs or demonstrations. The work contributes to understanding computational cycles and their implications in Claude’s framework.
items.summary_zh: 这份由斯坦福/ Knuth 团队整理的论文探讨了 Claude 中的循环现象，给出形式化分析与潜在的算法洞见。内容聚焦 Claude 语境下的重复结构，包含证明或演示。该研究有助于理解计算循环及其在 Claude 框架中的意义。

items.title_en: Glaze by Raycast
items.title_zh: Raycast 推出 Glaze
items.summary_en: Raycast expands its ecosystem with Glaze, a new tool designed to streamline workflows on macOS. Built around a keyboard-first UX, Glaze aims to accelerate automation, file actions, and quick commands for developers and power users. The release signals Raycast's shift from a single launcher toward a broader automation platform.
items.summary_zh: Raycast 将生态扩展至 Glaze，一款旨在简化 macOS 工作流程的新工具。延续其以键盘为中心的用户体验，Glaze 可能为开发者和高级用户带来更紧密的自动化与便捷操作。此举标志着 Raycast 正向一体化自动化平台发展。

items.title_en: The View from RSS
items.title_zh: 来自 RSS 的视角
items.summary_en: This piece defends RSS as a resilient, privacy-preserving way to consume content in an era of algorithm-driven feeds. It discusses open standards, the fragility of platform lock-in, and why independent feeds still matter for creators and readers.
items.summary_zh: 本文捍卫 RSS 作为在算法驱动的信息流时代仍具韧性、重视隐私的内容获取方式。讨论开放标准、平台锁定的脆弱性，以及独立订阅源对创作者和读者的重要性。

items.title_en: What Python’s asyncio primitives get wrong about shared state
items.title_zh: Python 的 asyncio 原语在共享状态方面哪里错了
items.summary_en: Python's asyncio primitives can mishandle shared state, leading to subtle race conditions or lost updates in concurrent code. The piece surveys patterns that avoid these pitfalls, such as explicit synchronization, avoiding shared mutable state, and using higher-level abstractions.
items.summary_zh: Python 的 asyncio 原语在处理共享状态时容易出错，可能在并发代码中出现细微的竞争条件或丢失更新。文章探讨了避免这些坑的模式，如显式同步、避免共享可变状态，以及使用更高层的抽象。

items.title_en: Relax NG is a schema language for XML (2014)
items.title_zh: Relax NG：XML 的模式语言（2014）
items.summary_en: Relax NG offers a compact, readable alternative to XML Schema and gained traction as a simpler schema language for XML around 2014.
items.summary_zh: Relax NG 是一种简洁、可读性高的 XML 模式语言，2014 年左右在 XML 架构领域获得了更多关注，成为 XML Schema 的轻量替代选项。

items.title_en: Humans 40k yrs ago developed a system of conventional signs
items.title_zh: 四万年前人类发展出一种常规符号体系
items.summary_en: PNAS reports that humans 40,000 years ago developed a conventional system of signs, pushing back estimates for symbolic communication. This finding deepens our understanding of cognitive evolution and how early humans represented ideas beyond gesture and ritual.
items.summary_zh: PNAS 报告称，约 4 万年前的人类已经发展出一套常规符号体系，将符号沟通的时间推前。此发现深化了对认知进化和早期人类如何以符号表达思想的理解。

items.title_en: Was Windows 1.0's lack of overlapping windows a legal or a technical matter?
items.title_zh: Windows 1.0 缺乏重叠窗口，是法律问题还是技术问题？
items.summary_en: Examines whether Windows 1.0’s lack of overlapping windows was born from hardware/memory constraints or licensing quirks. The discussion sheds light on how early design choices were shaped more by tech limits than by legality, with implications for UI history.
items.summary_zh: 考察 Windows 1.0 缺少重叠窗口究竟是由硬件/内存限制还是许可问题驱动。讨论揭示早期设计选择更多受技术约束影响而非法律因素，对用户界面史有一定启示。

items.title_en: A CPU that runs entirely on GPU
items.title_zh: 一个完全在 GPU 上运行的 CPU
items.summary_en: A CPU implemented to run entirely on GPU hardware demonstrates offloading instruction scheduling and execution to GPU kernels, blurring the line between CPU and GPU architectures. The project is not about replacing CPUs yet, but it shows how GPU-centric designs could inform emulation, education, and certain HPC workloads. It hints at potential benefits like unified memory usage and high parallelism for specific tasks.
items.summary_zh: 这个在GPU上完整运行的CPU展示了将指令执行移植到GPU内核的可能性，模糊了CPU与GPU的边界。该项目尚不能替代实际CPU，但为仿真、教育和高性能计算场景提供了新的设计思路，可能带来内存整合和并行性提升的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Emails to Outlook.com rejected due to a fault or overzealous blocking rules
items.title_zh: 发往 Outlook.com 的邮件被拒收：故障或过度拦截规则所致
items.summary_en: A fault or aggressive filtering caused legitimate emails to be blocked by Outlook.com, disrupting communication for users. The episode illustrates how backend policy or bugs can create wide-scoped reliability issues and the importance of robust monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 发往 Outlook.com 的邮件因故障或过度拦截规则被拒收，干扰用户沟通。此事件凸显后台策略或错误如何引发广泛的可靠性问题，以及加强监控的重要性。

items.title_en: MyFirst Kids Watch Hacked. Access to Camera and Microphone
items.title_zh: 我的第一块儿童手表被破解：获得摄像头和麦克风访问权限
items.summary_en: A security demonstration shows a kid's smartwatch being hacked to access its camera and microphone, exposing IoT security flaws in consumer wearables. The case reinforces the need for strong access controls, secure firmware, and responsible disclosure in IoT.
items.summary_zh: 一次安全演示显示，一块儿童智能手表被破解，获取摄像头和麦克风访问权限，暴露了消费级可穿戴设备的物联安全缺陷。案例强调需要强访问控制、固件安全和负责任的漏洞披露。

items.title_en: Libre Solar – Open Hardware for Renewable Energy
items.title_zh: Libre Solar：面向可再生能源的开源硬件
items.summary_en: Libre Solar offers open hardware designs for renewable energy, from solar charge controllers to microinverters, enabling DIY communities to build and customize sustainable electronics. The project underscores the value of open-source hardware in accelerating energy tech adoption.
items.summary_zh: Libre Solar 提供面向可再生能源的开源硬件设计，从太阳能充电控制器到微型逆变器，帮助社区搭建并定制可持续电子设备。该项目凸显了开源硬件在推动能源科技普及方面的价值。

items.title_en: AMD will bring its “Ryzen AI” processors to standard desktop PCs for first time
items.title_zh: AMD 将把 Ryzen AI 处理器首次带入主流桌面 PC
items.summary_en: AMD will bring Ryzen AI CPUs to mainstream AM5 desktop PCs for the first time, introducing AI acceleration and upgraded graphics to consumer hardware. This move signals a broader industry push to bake AI capabilities into standard PCs, affecting software optimization and gaming workloads.
items.summary_zh: AMD 将首次把 Ryzen AI 处理器带入主流 AM5 桌面电脑，集成 AI 加速和改进的显卡性能到消费级硬件中。这一举措标志着厂商在消费级电脑中普遍嵌入 AI 能力的趋势，它将影响软件优化和游戏等工作负载的性能表现。

items.title_en: Picking Up a Zillion Pieces of Litter
items.title_zh: 捡起无数垃圾碎片
items.summary_en: An essay about picking up litter and how small, continuous actions can improve communities and environments. It discusses practical approaches to cleanup and the motivation needed to sustain such civic efforts.
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论在日常生活中捡拾大量垃圾的行动，以及持续进行的小规模清洁如何改善社区与环境。提出切实可行的清洁策略，并强调公民参与的重要性。

items.title_en: Arabic document from 17th-cent. rubbish heap confirms semi-legendary Nubian king
items.title_zh: 17世纪垃圾堆中的阿拉伯文献证实半传说的努比亚王
items.summary_en: An Arabic document from a 17th-century rubbish heap confirms a semi-legendary Nubian king, reshaping the historical record. The discovery highlights how discarded material can illuminate obscure periods and shows how historians date and authenticate ancient texts.
items.summary_zh: 一份来自17世纪垃圾堆的阿拉伯文献证实了半传说的努比亚王，重新构塑了相关历史记录。此发现凸显被丢弃的材料如何为模糊的历史提供线索，也展示了学者如何通过文本学和年代学进行鉴定。

items.title_en: Earth Garden: Field Recordings Around the World
items.title_zh: Earth Garden：全球田野录音
items.summary_en: A project collecting field recordings from across the world forms an accessible sonic archive of natural and cultural soundscapes.
items.summary_zh: 一个收集全球田野录音的项目，打造了一个可访问的声音档案，覆盖自然与文化场景。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi Pico as AM Radio Transmitter
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi Pico 作为 AM 无线电发射机
items.summary_en: A project shows the Raspberry Pi Pico can function as an AM radio transmitter with minimal hardware, illustrating how hobbyist microcontrollers can explore radio tech. It highlights accessible experimentation but also considerations around regulatory compliance and signal integrity.
items.summary_zh: 该项目展示了 Raspberry Pi Pico 在最小硬件条件下实现 AM 无线电发射，体现了业余微控制器在无线电技术探索中的可行性。也提醒关注合规性与信号质量等问题。

items.title_en: World-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite
items.title_zh: 全球首个飞机与地球同步卫星之间的千兆位激光链路
items.summary_en: ESA reports world-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite, signaling new possibilities for airborne-to-space communications. Laser communications offer high throughput and low latency, but face alignment and weather challenges as the technology scales.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲航天局宣布实现全球首个空中与地球同步卫星之间的千兆位激光链路，标志着机载-太空通信的新前景。激光通信具有高吞吐、低时延等优势，但在对准与天气条件方面仍存在挑战。

items.title_en: Malm Whale
items.title_zh: 马尔姆鲸
items.summary_en: A travel-focused piece about the Malm Whale, a notable marine specimen or exhibit that attracts curious visitors. It spotlights quirky natural history artifacts and how unique curiosities spark public interest.
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦“马尔姆鲸”这一独特的自然史展品，吸引好奇的游客前来探访。文章凸显了罕见自然史展品如何激发公众的探索兴趣。

items.title_en: Dbslice: Extract a slice of your production database to reproduce bugs
items.title_zh: Dbslice：从生产数据库提取子集以复现缺陷
items.summary_en: Dbslice lets you extract a realistic, small slice of a production database to reproduce bugs in staging, enabling reliable debugging with safer data handling.
items.summary_zh: Dbslice 允许从生产数据库提取一个小规模的、具备真实数据特征的切片，在预发布环境中复现缺陷，提升调试的可重复性并保护数据隐私。

items.title_en: Billy bookshelves as a retro motherboard "rack"
items.title_zh: Billy 书架改造为复古主板机架
items.summary_en: A maker repurposes an IKEA Billy bookcase into a modular rack for retro computer hardware, turning affordable furniture into a practical display and storage solution.
items.summary_zh: 一位制作爱好者将 IKEA 的 Billy 书架改造成复古主板机架，将廉价家具变成实用且可扩展的硬件展示与存储系统。
